questionHtml: Outline the impact of competition on the niche of an organism.
markschemeHtml:
a. competition can limit the niche 

b. competition can limit resources

c. when competition is removed the niche can expand 

d. can result in exclusion or removal of a species from a niche / only one species can occupy a niche

meta.title: Outline the impact of competition on the niche of an organism.
breadcrumbLabels: Option C: Ecology and conservation (Core topics)
Option C: Ecology and conservation (Core topics)
